title: PlaneRelativeZ Property
description:
For the end conditions related to positions, this property sets the relative position in Z direction to set Plane.

It is used when RelativePlane is specified by PosCheckType.

Z direction follows the coordinate system specified by PlaneRelativeOrg.

Values

Minimum value -2000

Maximum value 2000

Default:  0

See Also: PlaneRelativeZ Property

PlaneRelativeX Property

PlaneRelativeY Property
